message:
test(proptest): add 24 serde roundtrip tests for mission_loop uncovered types

Covers operator override system (OperatorOverrideKind, OperatorOverride,
OperatorOverrideState, OverrideApplicationSummary, PinnedAssignmentRecord,
ReprioritizedBeadRecord), conflict detection details (AssignmentConflict,
DeconflictionMessage, KnownResourceReservation), mission metrics
(MissionMetricsLabels, ExtractionSummary, ScorerSummary,
MissionMetricsTotals, MissionCycleMetricsSample, MissionDecision),
and operator report system (OperatorStatusSection, AgentAssignmentRow,
OperatorHealthSection, OperatorConflictSection, OperatorConflictSummary,
OperatorEventSection, OperatorDecisionSummary, OperatorFactorSummary,
OperatorStatusReport).

Total: 44 tests (was 20).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
